hero.tagline: Transform Your Life Through the Ancient Science of Yoga
hero.subtagline: Expert guidance in Hatha, Vinyasa & Pranayama. Batches for all levels, all ages.

about.heading: About the School
about.schoolDesc: Ananda Yoga Kendra has been a sanctuary for sincere practitioners since its founding. Rooted in classical yoga tradition and informed by modern understanding, we offer a complete path — from beginner asana to advanced pranayama, philosophy, and meditation.
about.teacherBio: With over 15 years of dedicated practice and teaching, our founder brings deep grounding in the classical yoga tradition alongside a warm, accessible teaching style. Certified in [Your Certifications], with training under [Your Lineage], the teaching draws on the full breadth of the yoga tradition.
